commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Slack fake provider server, shared fake-server HTTP helpers, Slack CLI/export/OpenClaw adapter wiring, documentation, and tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. for the feature itself. For review, the relevant source checks are the Slack fake-server endpoints, OpenClaw helper mapping, docs, and tests at the current PR head.
